note: EXAMPLE of the operator's private/local companion list. Copy this to skills.sources.local.json (gitignored) and put your real entries there. The CLI merges this local file over skills.sources.json at runtime (by id). Local paths and private/unpublished repos belong ONLY in the gitignored file — never in the public skills.sources.json and never in docs.

sources.name: An example locally-collected pack
sources.notes: local-only entries are never published and never auto-cloned. install_mode copy-from-existing means you copy from source_path yourself; the CLI only ever reports the plan.

sources.name: An example public pack you have verified
sources.notes: Only entries you have personally verified (real public https upstream + license) and marked provenance_status verified + install_mode clone are eligible for `skills bootstrap --apply`.
